error_signature: 400 Invalid value for 'content': expected a string, got null
title: OpenAI Chat Model node returns 400 error for null content
symptom: The OpenAI Chat Model node throws a 400 error indicating that it received a null value instead of a string for the 'content' parameter after processing a few items.
applies_when: Processing multiple items in a workflow
not_this_if: Error occurs with a single item or different node
root_cause: The error occurs when the OpenAI Chat Model node receives a null value for the 'content' parameter, which can happen if the input data is not properly validated or if there are issues with memory management in the workflow.
fix_steps: Clear the memory associated with the workflow
Update the key to the attached memory
agent_instruction: Clear the memory and update the key to the attached memory before reprocessing the items.
